{{CargoRelic
|name=Hun Min Jong Um
|class_id=20918
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=04-03
|source=
|description=On Apr 3, 1443 AD, Hun Min Jong Um samples were created to promote laws.<br>King Sejong created Hangul, a writing system for his people. Due to the suzerain language's complexity, King Sejong appointed scholars to compile Hun Min Jong Um, a guide for the Korean people to learn their own language.
|fame=45
|art=23
|fth=33
|civ=24
|tech=29
|ss1=Per Exploration completed, Snail DEF +6<br>Explorations completed: 20/20
|ss2=Per Exploration completed, Snail DEF +8<br>Explorations completed: 20/20
|ss3=Per Exploration completed, Snail DEF +10<br>Explorations completed: 20/20
|ss4=Per Exploration completed, Snail DEF +14<br>Explorations completed: 20/20
|ss7=Per Exploration completed, Snail DEF +14<br>Explorations completed: 20/20<br>Snail DEF +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Koryeo skill I.png|50px]]Place in Koryeon Museum: In Koryeo, FAME Checks -5
}}
